metadata.unitRule: All internal pump flows are LPH. Source LPM is multiplied by 60 and source m3/hr by 1000.
metadata.sourcePriority: Domestic 2026 supersedes duplicate Domestic 2025 rows. Domestic 2025 is retained as a source cross-check, not duplicated.
metadata.excludedNonPumpSections: Agricultural cable and control-panel pages are source references only and are not pump-selection records.
metadata.qaNote: Agricultural records with ambiguous or non-monotonic source extraction remain searchable but are excluded from automatic recommendations and brand comparison.
